description: A tranquil coastal scene at sunset or dawn. A sandy shore stretches from the left foreground toward a calm, mirror-like body of water that reflects pink and golden light from the sky. A large boulder sits on the beach near a small wooden rowboat. Distant sailboats are barely visible on the horizon. The sky is filled with soft pink and lavender clouds. The overall atmosphere is peaceful and luminous, with warm tones dominating the composition.

_meta.title: Sea shore in the vicinity Oranienbaum
